tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's ID, email, name, and the active organization MCP is acting on. Identity comes from the OAuth token — no parameters needed.

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.description: List all organizations the authenticated user belongs to, with their role in each. Use switch_active_org to change which one MCP acts on.

tools.name: switch_active_org
tools.description: Set which organization MCP acts on for subsequent tool calls. The selection is verified against your memberships and persists for this connection.

tools.name: list_forms
tools.description: List forms in the active organization, with status and share/edit URLs. Supports search, sort, and pagination.

tools.name: get_form
tools.description: Get full details of a form (steps, theme, configuration) by ID, with share/edit URLs.

tools.name: create_form
tools.description: Create a new form in the active organization. 'structured' is a Logic Funnel (default), 'dynamic' is an AI Funnel. Use update_form to add steps/theme after creation.

tools.name: update_form
tools.description: Update a form's configuration. Only include the fields you want to change under `form` — omitted fields are left untouched.

tools.name: delete_form
tools.description: Permanently delete a form and all its versions and replies. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: create_reply
tools.description: Create a reply on the form's latest published version. Optionally seed respondent info and answers (question key -> value).

tools.name: publish_form
tools.description: Publish the form's current draft as a new live version. Required before a form can receive replies.

tools.name: get_form_version
tools.description: Get a specific form version by its version ID.

tools.name: get_published_form_version
tools.description: Get the latest published version of a form (the live snapshot respondents see).

tools.name: suggest_scoring_criteria
tools.description: AI-generate suggested hot/warm/cold lead-scoring criteria for a form.

tools.name: update_scoring_criteria
tools.description: Set a form's hot/warm/cold lead-scoring criteria. Returns the updated form.

tools.name: list_replies
tools.description: List replies for a form (paginated). Returns respondent data, status, and scoring verdict.

tools.name: get_reply
tools.description: Get a single reply by ID, including answers and scoring.

tools.name: delete_reply
tools.description: Permanently delete a single reply. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: batch_delete_replies
tools.description: Permanently delete up to 100 replies of a form. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: override_verdict
tools.description: Manually set or reset a reply's lead verdict (hot/warm/cold). Returns the updated reply.

tools.name: rescore_form_replies
tools.description: Re-run AI lead scoring across a form's replies. Returns the number marked for scoring.

tools.name: mark_actioned
tools.description: Mark a reply as actioned (followed up on).

tools.name: get_form_scoring_state
tools.description: Get a form's lead-scoring state: pending hot-lead count, whether criteria are active, and last criteria update.

tools.name: list_organization_hot_lead_counts
tools.description: List per-form hot-lead counts across the active organization.

tools.name: get_replies_insights
tools.description: Get aggregate insights for a form's replies over a time range (completion, drop-off, answer distributions).

tools.name: analytics_chat
tools.description: Ask a natural-language question about a form's replies. Returns the assistant's final answer (single-shot; the analytics agent may query the data to respond).

tools.name: list_zapier_hooks
tools.description: List Zapier webhook subscriptions for a form.

tools.name: toggle_zapier_hook
tools.description: Activate or pause a Zapier webhook subscription.

tools.name: delete_zapier_hook
tools.description: Permanently delete a Zapier webhook subscription. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: list_connections
tools.description: List integration connections (webhook, Slack, HubSpot, etc.) in the active organization. Optionally filter by provider.

tools.name: get_connection
tools.description: Get a single connection by ID.

tools.name: create_webhook_connection
tools.description: Create a webhook or Discord connection (no OAuth). For Slack/HubSpot/Mailchimp/etc., connect via the dashboard's OAuth flow first.

tools.name: revoke_connection
tools.description: Revoke a connection (stops future deliveries). Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: delete_connection
tools.description: Permanently delete a connection and its integrations. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: reconnect_quota_precheck
tools.description: Check the backfill backlog for a connection before reconnecting it.

tools.name: list_integrations
tools.description: List integrations configured on a form.

tools.name: get_integration
tools.description: Get a single integration by ID.

tools.name: create_integration
tools.description: Create a spreadsheet-style integration (Google Sheets/Airtable/Notion) on a form, mapping form answers to columns.

tools.name: create_integration_from_config
tools.description: Create a message-style integration (Webhook/Discord/Slack/HubSpot/Mailchimp) on a form from a full action config.

tools.name: delete_integration
tools.description: Permanently delete an integration from a form. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: toggle_integration
tools.description: Activate or pause an integration. Returns the updated integration.

tools.name: list_integration_events
tools.description: List recent delivery events for an integration.

tools.name: replay_integration_event
tools.description: Re-enqueue a failed or past integration delivery event.

tools.name: list_airtable_bases
tools.description: List Airtable bases available to a connection.

tools.name: list_slack_channels
tools.description: List Slack channels available to a connection.

tools.name: list_hubspot_contact_properties
tools.description: List HubSpot contact properties available to a connection.

tools.name: list_mailchimp_audiences
tools.description: List Mailchimp audiences available to a connection.

tools.name: get_org_branding
tools.description: Get the active organization's white-label branding (logo, favicon, brand color).

tools.name: update_org_branding
tools.description: Update the active org's white-label branding. Owner/admin only. Returns the updated branding.

tools.name: get_org_email_config
tools.description: Get the active org's white-label email config (sender name, reply-to).

tools.name: update_org_email_config
tools.description: Update the active org's white-label email config. Owner/admin only.

tools.name: list_custom_domains
tools.description: List the active organization's custom domains and their status.

tools.name: add_custom_domain
tools.description: Add a custom domain to the active org (returns DNS instructions). Owner/admin only.

tools.name: verify_custom_domain
tools.description: Re-check a custom domain's DNS/verification and promote it to active when healthy. Owner/admin only.

tools.name: remove_custom_domain
tools.description: Remove a custom domain from the active org. Owner/admin only. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: set_custom_domain_default_form
tools.description: Pin (or clear, with null) the default form a custom domain serves at its root. Owner/admin only.

tools.name: get_ai_provider_status
tools.description: Get the active org's BYOK (bring-your-own-key) AI provider status. Owner only.

tools.name: save_ai_provider_key
tools.description: Set the active org's BYOK AI provider key (validated before saving). Owner only. The key is never returned.

tools.name: remove_ai_provider_key
tools.description: Remove the active org's BYOK AI provider key. Owner only. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: get_quiz_credits_status
tools.description: Get the acting user's quiz-credits balance and status.

tools.name: create_quiz_credits_checkout
tools.description: Create a checkout session to purchase quiz credits. Returns a checkout URL. Requires a verified email.

tools.name: search_photos
tools.description: Search Pexels for background photos (welcome/end screens, questions).

tools.name: search_videos
tools.description: Search Pexels for background videos (welcome/end screens, questions).

tools.name: refine_prompt
tools.description: AI-refine a form-building prompt for the given funnel type. Returns the refined prompt text (single-shot).

tools.name: transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe base64-encoded audio to text.

tools.name: upload_blob
tools.description: Upload a file (base64) to blob storage for use in forms. Returns the blob URL.

tools.name: delete_blob
tools.description: Delete a blob by its URL. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: import_agent_profile
tools.description: Extract a business/agent profile from a website URL (for marketplace discovery). Returns the extracted profile; use update_form to persist it.

tools.name: get_chat
tools.description: Get a chat (e.g. a form-editor conversation) by its reference ID.

tools.name: load_messages
tools.description: Load the messages of a chat by its reference ID.

tools.name: clear_messages
tools.description: Clear all messages in a chat by its reference ID. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: delete_chat
tools.description: Permanently delete a chat by ID. Pass confirm: true to proceed.

tools.name: chat_form_editor
tools.description: Conversationally edit a form. Provide the form id and the conversation; the assistant reads the form, applies edits (persisted), and returns its summary plus the updated form.

tools.name: run_ax_audit
tools.description: Run an Agent Experience (AX) audit on a website: fetch the page and score how ready it is for AI agents and crawlers across 10 dimensions (crawlability, structured data, actionability, agent interaction, discoverability, content quality, performance, authoritativeness, freshness, security). Returns

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all available service categories on the Dashform marketplace with merchant counts. Use this to understand what types of services are available before searching.

tools.name: search_merchants
tools.description: Search for businesses and service providers on the Dashform marketplace. Filter by category, location, or keyword. Each result includes a funnel_id you can use with get_business_info, get_services, check_fit, and book_appointment.

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Search for specific services across all marketplace merchants. Find services by name, category, price range, or location. Each result includes the provider funnel_id for booking.

tools.name: get_business_info
tools.description: Get business information for a Dashform funnel, including description, industry, location, services, and booking link. Use this to understand what a business offers before checking lead fit.

tools.name: get_services
tools.description: Get the list of services or products offered by a business through this funnel. Optionally filter by category.

tools.name: get_form_questions
tools.description: Get the list of questions for this funnel. Returns question keys, types, descriptions, and options. Call this BEFORE check_fit or book_appointment to understand what information to collect from leads.

tools.name: check_fit
tools.description: Evaluate lead fit against this business. Provide answers keyed by question keys from get_form_questions. Returns a score (0-100), fit assessment, confidence level, reasoning, and recommended next action. Also accepts legacy lead object for backwards compatibility.

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Get booking availability for this business. Returns a booking link (e.g. Calendly) if configured, or a message about how to schedule.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Submit a lead's information to request an appointment. Provide answers keyed by question keys from get_form_questions. Creates a reply record visible in the dashboard and triggers connected integrations (CRM, email, webhooks). Also accepts legacy lead object for backwards compatibility.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_user_info" references sensitive artifacts (auth token). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get the authenticated user's ID, email, name, and the active organization MCP is acting on. Identity comes from the OAuth token — no parameters needed.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_user_info, list_forms, get_form, get_org_email_config, get_chat, load_messages, run_ax_audit, get_availability · Private data: get_user_info, list_hubspot_contact_properties, upload_blob, book_appointment · Public sink: get_user_info, list_forms, get_form, publish_form, list_zapier_hooks, toggle_zapier_hook, delete_zapier_hook, list_connections, create_webhook_connection, create_integration_from_config, get_org_email_config, update_org_email_config, create_quiz_credits_checkout, upload_blob, book_appointment · Destructive: delete_form, delete_reply, batch_delete_replies, override_verdict, rescore_form_replies, get_replies_insights, delete_zapier_hook, delete_connection, delete_integration, remove_custom_domain, remove_ai_provider_key, delete_blob, delete_chat, run_ax_audit.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_user_info, list_forms, get_form, get_org_email_config, get_chat, load_messages, run_ax_audit, get_availability · Private data: get_user_info, list_hubspot_contact_properties, upload_blob, book_appointment · Public sink: get_user_info, list_forms, get_form, publish_form, list_zapier_hooks, toggle_zapier_hook, delete_zapier_hook, list_connections, create_webhook_connection, create_integration_from_config, get_org_email_config, update_org_email_config, create_quiz_credits_checkout, upload_blob, book_appointment · Destructive: delete_form, delete_reply, batch_delete_replies, override_verdict, rescore_form_replies, get_replies_insights, delete_zapier_hook, delete_connection, delete_integration, remove_custom_domain, remove_ai_provider_key, delete_blob, delete_chat, run_ax_audit

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
